novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Sun Shao did not disobey Xu Sheng’s orders at the battle of Guangling. Nor was he ordered executed.

full_text:
Sun Shao (Gongli) 孫韶 (公禮)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Shao (孫韶), styledGongli (公禮), was born in Wu. Disobeyed Xu Sheng to fool opposing Wei forces. Maintained strong defense against Wei. Sun Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Shao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
